content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the left ahead with the dashed center line visible, and the car appears well-positioned on the right side of center heading westward.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 73, target index = (73+5) % 121 = 78
- WP78: x=2.7979, y=4.4950
- Car: x=2.4455, y=4.5430, heading=166.44°
- dy = 4.4950 - 4.5430 = -0.0480
- dx = 2.7979 - 2.4455 = +0.3524
- bearing = atan2(-0.0480, 0.3524) ≈ -7.76°
- delta = -7.76° - 166.44° = -174.20°, normalize: -174.20° + 360° = **+185.80°**, then -360° = **-174.20°**

WP78 is behind/east — car has nearly passed it. Try WP76:
- WP76: x=1.9924, y=4.4840
- dy = 4.4840 - 4.5430 = -0.0590, dx = 1.9924 - 2.4455 = -0.4531
- bearing = atan2(-0.0590, -0.4531) → 180° + atan(0.0590/0.4531) = 180° + 7.42° = **-172.58°** (third quadrant)
- delta = -172.58° - 166.44° = -339.02°, normalize: +20.98° → **+21°** moderate left

**Boundary check:** track_width/2 = 0.3809m, distance_from_center = 0.0449m, is_left_of_center=false → edge_distance = 0.3809 - 0.0449 = 0.3360m → clear.

Delta ~+21° → steering_angle=+10°, speed=1.5.

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves left ahead in westward section, delta≈+21° to WP76 indicates moderate left correction needed; car is 0.045m right of center with 0.336m clearance, maintaining +10° steering at full speed.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track starts with long straight along y≈0.683 before curving left around x=6.3-7.3.",
    "Left curve spans WP27-44 requiring sustained positive steering ~15°.",
    "After left curve, track straightens westward along y≈2.77 (WP44-55).",
    "WP55-70 region: track bends southwest with gentle-to-moderate left curve.",
    "WP70-80 section: delta consistently ~+21°, track curving left heading west-northwest ~164-166°.",
    "Car consistently 0.03-0.05m right of center in WP70-80 section — no boundary concern.",
    "WP76 at (1.992, 4.484) is reliable lookahead target in this section.",
    "Prefer speed 1.5 on straights and gentle curves; reduce to 1.0 only when delta >30°.",
    "WP80+ region: track continues westward then curves south/southeast back to start.",
    "Track total 121 waypoints, ~17.7m length, car at ~62% progress."
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [2.730, 2.636, 2.532, 2.446],
    "y": [4.487, 4.513, 4.531, 4.543],
    "heading": [159.095, 161.420, 164.019, 166.443]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP76 at (1.992, 4.484): bearing=-172.58°, delta=+20.98° → moderate left correction needed.",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 10.0
}
```
